messages.content:
The city of Elmsfield is using electronic sensors to collect data on traffic patterns, air pollution, and crime. This data is used to manage assets and resources more efficiently and in real time.

Which of these terms would better define the data collected from the sensors in this scenario?

Interval Data

Categorical Data

Ordinal Data

Big Data
Big Data

How should a company adopt a data-driven culture that will stick?

Use change management to transform how the company thinks about data.

Centralize all data operations within a single, specialized data team.

Offload data analytics functions to highly experienced vendors.

Maximize the budget spent on the implementation of new data tools and platforms.
Use change management to transform how the company thinks about data.

What does data warehousing allow organizations to achieve?

allows organizations to collect only the current day's data from their various databases

allows for the reduction of some of an organization's day-to-day server resources

allows organizations to replace all their day-to-day databases with operational systems

allows for analytics and reporting across the entire organization
allows for analytics and reporting across the entire organization

What differentiates data from information?

data and information are both contextualized

information and data are both generic

data is contextualized, information is generic

information is contextualized, data is generic
data is contextualized, information is generic

What is the next step an organization should take after capturing and collecting data?

contextualize data

break data into smaller chunks

filter and prioritize data

process and curate data
process and curate data

A client approaches Accenture for a solution to collate the large amounts of data it has collected over the years from various sources.

Which solution would help the client pool their data together?

a machine learning solution

a cloud analytics solution

an Agile solution

a DevOps solution
a cloud analytics solution

How should a common data source, like social media comments, be categorized

structured data

dirty data

unstructured data

temporary data
unstructured data

A health care provider approaches Accenture to help them increase their efficiency through an advanced data science platform.

What is the first step Accenture could take?

create comprehensive documentation of the process

formulate an enterprise analytics strategy assessment

train the client to independently manage their data

build a comprehensive data lake using archived data
formulate an enterprise analytics strategy assessment

Which technologies combine to make data a critical organizational asset?

Penetration Testing and Intelligence Practice

Internet of Things (IoT) and electronic devices

Speech and Natural Language Processing (NLP)

Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence (AI)
Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence (AI)

What is an advantage of storing data in a data lake without applying a specific schema to it initially?

It avoids corrupting the data by working with it before there is a clearly defined need.

It allows more flexibility to use the data in various, innovative ways.

It makes working with the data faster as data lakes are more efficient.

It saves both developer time and company money by never having to design a schema.
It allows more flexibility to use the data in various, innovative ways.

Company A acquired Company B and they realize that their standard security policy documents do not match. They escalate this issue to the company’s central Security team, who implements a plan to formalize security strategy, high-level responsibilities, policies and procedures around security of both companies.

Which security principle is illustrated in this example?

Compliance

Availability

Governance

Risk Management
Governance

One of Accenture’s clients is considering a major Cloud transformation project but is concerned about the time and costs associated with such an initiative.

What should Accenture’s security team focus on to address this particular client's concern?

Accenture is the only company that has the experience needed to implement major Cloud transformations.

Accenture’s Information Security Team uses waterfall methodology to ensure the migration is fully documented.

Accenture will delay the migration if there are vulnerabilities present in the client’s current systems.

Accenture has developed accelerators that can deploy specific security controls to Cloud environments in just a few hours, thereby reducing costs.
Accenture has developed accelerators that can deploy specific security controls to Cloud environments in just a few hours, thereby reducing costs.

A large retail corporation is trying to minimize the possibility of a cyberattack on customer data.

What would be a recommended strategy for preventing an attack?

Engage in penetration testing to uncover ways hackers might access the data.

Focus full attention and corporate resources on addressing known threats.

Focus on one potential threat and become experts in that type of threat protection.

Ensure compliance with applicable security standards for the retail industry.
Engage in penetration testing to uncover ways hackers might access the data.

For what reason can security risks never be fully eliminated?

Implementing new security measures is not important.

New security regulations make it impossible for organizations to evaluate security risks.

The threat landscape is constantly evolving with new threats emerging all the time.

There is no secure way to ensure the integrity of data when it is in transit.
The threat landscape is constantly evolving with new threats emerging all the time.

Which term refers to the process of creating and deploying applications that are secure from the start?

Waterfall

Risk Management

Compliance Assessment

DevOps
DevOps

When companies study the possibility of moving to the Cloud, they often perceive that security is a roadblock to making things happen quickly.

What should Accenture tell a client about their capabilities?

Once an incident occurs, Accenture establishes controls to block accidental or malicious activities.

Accenture’s security solution is so robust that it can be deployed on top of an existing system on the Cloud with no impact.

Accenture integrates security early in the process and implements their own patented innovations to automate processes and migrate in a much shorter period of time.
Accenture integrates security early in the process and implements their own patented innovations to automate processes and migrate in a much shorter period of time.

Which principle is in effect when an analyst has a lower level of access than a Client Account Lead (CAL) working on the same project?

The Principle of Superposition

The Privileges and Immunities Principle

The Principle of Known Threat Management

The Principle of Least Privilege
The Principle of Least Privilege

Accenture has engaged with a new financial client who is looking for a comprehensive, company-wide security solution, and has operations in Europe.

When designing the client’s solution, what should be prioritized between Confidentiality, Integrity, and Availability (CIA)?

Availability to protect the lives of the operators followed by Confidentiality, then Integrity

Confidentiality, Integrity and Availability are strictly controlled by the European government.

Integrity to make sure money is transferred to the appropriate accounts followed by Availability then Confidentiality.

Confidentiality because of the industry and regulations followed by Integrity, then Availability.
Confidentiality because of the industry and regulations followed by Integrity, then Availability.

Which term refers to a process that is deployed to ensure the confidentiality and integrity of data while being stored or when it is transmitted?

Security Operations

Access Management

Cloud Computing

Encryption
Encryption
